## Summary

Briefly describe the new feature or enhancement and its expected benefit.

---

## Template Type

- [ ] **Feature** — Adds new functionality
- [ ] **Enhancement** — Improves existing functionality

---

## Change Details

- What was added or changed?
- Why is this feature needed?
- Which alternatives were considered?

---

## Testing

- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] New or updated tests added for changed code
- [ ] Frontend lint and typecheck pass (`npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck` in `apps/web/`)

---

## Validation

- [ ] Tested locally against the running stack (`make up`)
- [ ] Secrets are not exposed in logs, screenshots, or code

---

## Definition of Done

- [ ] The contribution guidelines in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) were considered and applied.

---

## Additional Notes

Add any reviewer context, migration notes, or follow-up work.
